primary_blocker: Very thin STL uplift over LTL (~£72/mo net) — marginal financial case
key_intelligence: ABROAD with extremely thin income uplift: STL nets only ~£72/month more than LTL after all costs. Overseas management adds complexity. Primary risk: lead accepts LTL as the safer status quo. Only converts if void period risk of LTL is surfaced, or if projections improve with seasonal peak framing.
top_objections: Net uplift over LTL is very small — is STL worth the complexity?
How does management work when I'm overseas?
lead_language: Is it really worth the difference?
